evals.prompt: Use webfetch-cdp to fetch https://example.com and show me the YAML snapshot
evals.expected_output: Valid YAML snapshot containing page elements like headings, paragraphs, and links from example.com

evals.prompt: Use webfetch-cdp to fetch https://react.dev and show me the YAML snapshot. This is a React SPA so it needs JS rendering.
evals.expected_output: Valid YAML snapshot with React.dev page content, showing that dynamic content was properly rendered

evals.prompt: Use webfetch-cdp to search Google for '天天跳绳 AI动作捕捉' and show me the structured results
evals.expected_output: YAML snapshot containing Google search results with titles, links, and snippets for the search query

evals.prompt: Use webfetch-cdp to fetch https://github.com and show me what's on the page. I should be logged in already.
evals.expected_output: YAML snapshot showing GitHub content. If logged in, should show user-specific elements like feed, notifications, or dashboard

evals.prompt: Use webfetch-cdp to fetch https://this-domain-definitely-does-not-exist-12345.com and tell me what happens
evals.expected_output: Clear error message explaining what went wrong (DNS failure, connection timeout, etc.)
